name: Josh White Jr.
abstract: Joshua Donald White Jr. (November 30, 1940 – December 28, 2024) was an American Grammy Award-nominated recording artist who upheld the musical traditions of his father, the late bluesman Josh White.

concerts.label: Twilight at Carnegie Hall to Benefit Music for the Blind
Lead Belly Fest
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage

about_quotes.speaker: Ron Carter
about_quotes.evidence: I worked with folk singers, I worked with Josh White, Jr., I worked with Leon Bibb.
about_quotes.doc_title: Ron Carter — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
